# Daniel Mason — Portfolio

> Senior UX Designer · AI/ML · Enterprise SaaS · 12 years experience.
> The last product I helped design sold for $860 million (Zix, acquired by OpenText).

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://www.danielgmason.com/): Portfolio overview and featured case studies
- [Zix case study](https://www.danielgmason.com/zix): Unifying 21 enterprise apps across a merger; $860M acquisition
- [Pixly case study](https://www.danielgmason.com/pixly): Construction AI photo search POC; Kiewit pipeline
- [Open Door Legal case study](https://www.danielgmason.com/odl): Salesforce referral marketplace and grant management
- [About](https://www.danielgmason.com/about): Background, process, and FAQs
